Enhancing Robustness of Federated Learning via Server Learning
raw_items.text: This paper explores the use of server learning for enhancing the robustness of federated learning against malicious attacks even when clients' training data are not independent and identically distributed. We propose a heuristic algorithm that uses server learning and client update filtering in combination with geometric median aggregation. We demonstrate via experiments that this approach can achieve significant improvement in model accuracy even when the fraction of malicious clients is high,

raw_items.title: BAS: A Decision-Theoretic Approach to Evaluating Large Language Model Confidence
raw_items.text: Large language models (LLMs) often produce confident but incorrect answers in settings where abstention would be safer. Standard evaluation protocols, however, require a response and do not account for how confidence should guide decisions under different risk preferences. To address this gap, we introduce the Behavioral Alignment Score (BAS), a decision-theoretic metric for evaluating how well LLM confidence supports abstention-aware decision making. BAS is derived from an explicit answer-or-ab

raw_items.title: Hierarchical Planning with Latent World Models
raw_items.text: Model predictive control (MPC) with learned world models has emerged as a promising paradigm for embodied control, particularly for its ability to generalize zero-shot when deployed in new environments. However, learned world models often struggle with long-horizon control due to the accumulation of prediction errors and the exponentially growing search space. In this work, we address these challenges by learning latent world models at multiple temporal scales and performing hierarchical plannin

raw_items.title: A Tsetlin Machine-driven Intrusion Detection System for Next-Generation IoMT Security
raw_items.text: The rapid adoption of the Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) is transforming healthcare by enabling seamless connectivity among medical devices, systems, and services. However, it also introduces serious cybersecurity and patient safety concerns as attackers increasingly exploit new methods and emerging vulnerabilities to infiltrate IoMT networks. This paper proposes a novel Tsetlin Machine (TM)-based Intrusion Detection System (IDS) for detecting a wide range of cyberattacks targeting IoMT netwo

raw_items.title: PR3DICTR: A modular AI framework for medical 3D image-based detection and outcome prediction
raw_items.text: Three-dimensional medical image data and computer-aided decision making, particularly using deep learning, are becoming increasingly important in the medical field. To aid in these developments we introduce PR3DICTR: Platform for Research in 3D Image Classification and sTandardised tRaining. Built using community-standard distributions (PyTorch and MONAI), PR3DICTR provides an open-access, flexible and convenient framework for prediction model development, with an explicit focus on classificatio

raw_items.title: Coupled Control, Structured Memory, and Verifiable Action in Agentic AI (SCRAT -- Stochastic Control with Retrieval and Auditable Trajectories): A Comparative Perspective from Squirrel Locomotion and Scatter-Hoarding
raw_items.text: Agentic AI is increasingly judged not by fluent output alone but by whether it can act, remember, and verify under partial observability, delay, and strategic observation. Existing research often studies these demands separately: robotics emphasizes control, retrieval systems emphasize memory, and alignment or assurance work emphasizes checking and oversight. This article argues that squirrel ecology offers a sharp comparative case because arboreal locomotion, scatter-hoarding, and audience-sens

raw_items.title: Learning the Signature of Memorization in Autoregressive Language Models
raw_items.text: All prior membership inference attacks for fine-tuned language models use hand-crafted heuristics (e.g., loss thresholding, Min-K\%, reference calibration), each bounded by the designer's intuition. We introduce the first transferable learned attack, enabled by the observation that fine-tuning any model on any corpus yields unlimited labeled data, since membership is known by construction. This removes the shadow model bottleneck and brings membership inference into the deep learning era: learni

raw_items.title: Real-Time Surrogate Modeling for Personalized Blood Flow Prediction and Hemodynamic Analysis
raw_items.text: Cardiovascular modeling has rapidly advanced over the past few decades due to the rising needs for health tracking and early detection of cardiovascular diseases. While 1-D arterial models offer an attractive compromise between computational efficiency and solution fidelity, their application on large populations or for generating large \emph{in silico} cohorts remains challenging. Certain hemodynamic parameters like the terminal resistance/compliance, are difficult to clinically estimate and of

raw_items.title: Reliability Gated Multi-Teacher Distillation for Low Resource Abstractive Summarization
raw_items.text: We study multiteacher knowledge distillation for low resource abstractive summarization from a reliability aware perspective. We introduce EWAD (Entropy Weighted Agreement Aware Distillation), a token level mechanism that routes supervision between teacher distillation and gold supervision based on inter teacher agreement, and CPDP (Capacity Proportional Divergence Preservation), a geometric constraint on the student position relative to heterogeneous teachers. Across two Bangla datasets, 13 Ban

raw_items.title: The Compression Gap: Why Discrete Tokenization Limits Vision-Language-Action Model Scaling
raw_items.text: Scaling Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models by upgrading the vision encoder is expected to improve downstream manipulation performance--as it does in vision-language modeling. We show that this expectation fails when actions are represented as discrete tokens, and explain why through an information-theoretic principle we call the Compression Gap: in any visuomotor pipeline, scaling behavior is governed by the location of the tightest information bottleneck. summarized_items.title: OpenAI's fall from grace as investors race to Anthropic
summarized_items.title_ja: 投資家がAnthropicに殺到する中でのOpenAIの失墜
summarized_items.summary_ja: OpenAIが投資家の信頼を失い、代わりにAnthropicが注目を集めている市場動向。AI業界の勢力図が変化していることを示している。

summarized_items.title: Claude Code is unusable for complex engineering tasks with the Feb updates
summarized_items.title_ja: 2月のアップデート以降、Claude Codeが複雑なエンジニアリングタスクで使用困難
summarized_items.summary_ja: Claude Codeの2月のアップデート後、複雑なエンジニアリング作業での性能が低下している問題。開発者からの不満の声が上がっており、実用性に影響を与えている。

summarized_items.title: Show HN: Real-time AI (audio/video in, voice out) on an M3 Pro with Gemma E2B
summarized_items.title_ja: M3 ProでGemma E2Bを使用したリアルタイムAI（音声・映像入力、音声出力）
summarized_items.summary_ja: M3 Proチップ搭載デバイスでGemma E2Bモデルを使用し、音声と映像を入力として音声を出力するリアルタイムAIシステムのデモ。マルチモーダルAIの実用例を示している。

summarized_items.title: Tell HN: Anthropic no longer allowing Claude Code subscriptions to use OpenClaw
summarized_items.title_ja: AnthropicがClaude CodeでのOpenClaw使用を禁止
summarized_items.summary_ja: AnthropicがClaude Codeの有料購読者によるOpenClawの使用を制限する方針を発表。サービス利用規約の変更により、特定のツールとの連携が制限される。開発者コミュニティに影響を与える可能性がある。

summarized_items.title: Show HN: I built a tiny LLM to demystify how language models work
summarized_items.title_ja: 言語モデルの仕組みを理解するための小型LLMを構築
summarized_items.summary_ja: 言語モデルの動作原理を学習・理解するために設計された小規模なLLMの実装プロジェクト。教育目的で作られており、LLMの内部構造を分かりやすく説明している。

summarized_items.title: Nanocode: The best Claude Code that $200 can buy in pure JAX on TPUs
summarized_items.title_ja: Nanocode: TPU上のJAXで200ドルで実現する最高のClaude Code
summarized_items.summary_ja: 200ドルの予算でTPU上でJAXを使用してClaude Codeライクな性能を実現するNanocodeプロジェクト。コストパフォーマンスに優れたAI開発環境の提案。

summarized_items.title: Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI
summarized_items.title_ja: 8年間の願望、AIで3ヶ月での実現
summarized_items.summary_ja: 長年実現したかったプロジェクトをAI技術の活用により3ヶ月という短期間で完成させた体験談。AI技術が個人開発者の生産性を劇的に向上させる実例を示している。

summarized_items.title: Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code
summarized_items.title_ja: LM StudioのヘッドレスCLIとClaude CodeでGemma 4をローカル実行
summarized_items.summary_ja: LM Studioの新しいコマンドラインインターフェースとClaude Codeを使用してGemma 4モデルをローカル環境で動作させる方法。開発者向けの実用的なツール組み合わせを紹介している。

summarized_items.title: A tail-call interpreter in (nightly) Rust
summarized_items.title_ja: Rust（nightly版）でのテイルコール・インタープリター
summarized_items.summary_ja: Rust言語のnightly版を使用してテイルコール最適化を実装したインタープリターの開発プロジェクト。プログラミング言語処理系の実装技術に関する内容。

summarized_items.title: France pulls last gold held in US for $15B gain
summarized_items.title_ja: フランスが米国保有の金を引き揚げ、150億ドルの利益
summarized_items.summary_ja: フランスが米国に保管していた金準備を本国に移送し、150億ドルの利益を得た。金融政策および地政学的な観点から注目される動き。AI関連情報ではない。

digest:
## 今日の最重要トレンド
AI業界の勢力図が大きく変化しており、投資家がOpenAIから離れてAnthropicに注目を集めている。一方でAnthropicのClaude Codeは2月のアップデート以降、複雑なエンジニアリングタスクでの性能低下や使用制限の問題を抱えている。AI市場のリーダー交代期における品質と信頼性の課題が浮き彫りになっている。

## ビジネスへの示唆
AI企業選択において投資家の信頼が急速に移り変わる時代であり、技術力だけでなく継続的な品質維持が重要。特定のAIサービスへの依存度を下げ、複数のプロバイダーを活用するリスク分散戦略が必要。

## 注目すべき技術動向
M3 ProでのGemma E2Bを使ったリアルタイムマルチモーダルAIが実用レベルに到達し、エッジデバイスでの高性能AI処理が現実化。小型LLMの教育プロジェクトにより、AI技術の民主化と理解促進が進んでいる。
